elements.original_description: A red circular arrow symbolizing repetition, frozen mid-spin against a pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a red circular arrow symbolizing repetition, perfectly frozen mid-spin. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients. Placed on a pure white background. The visual conveys a sense of abrupt interruption in its cycle.

elements.original_description: A yellow pause button symbol, placed directly in front of the same red circular arrow, interrupting its flow against a pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon. A yellow pause button symbol is placed directly in front of a red circular arrow, visually interrupting its flow. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients. Composition on a pure white background. The mood is one of decisive intervention, breaking the pattern.
